items.raw_desc: Kerékpáros sisak Nickelodeon Přilba na kolo in mold Tlapková patrola boys M:No one should be without a bicycle helmet in their kit for both challenging and relaxing trips. We have a quality Nickelodeon helmet for your kids. The TatoMTB, Skate/Inline and Freestyle Kids Bike Helmet is ideal for boys from 3 years.  For 6 to 4The Nickelodeon children's bike helmet is CE certified to EN 1078:2012+A1. The highest strength of the bicycle helmet is provided by in-mould technology, where the inner skeleton of the helmet is injection moulded directly onto the polystyrene construction.
